PREAMB.DEPDOC: [Internal Agency Docket No. FEMA-1871-DR; Docket ID FEMA-2010-0002]
PREAMB.SUBJECT: North Carolina; Amendment No. 1 to Notice of a Major Disaster Declaration

SUM.P: This notice amends the notice of a major disaster declaration for the State of North Carolina (FEMA-1871-DR), dated February 2, 2010, and related determinations.

FURINF.P: Peggy Miller, Disaster Assistance Directorate, Federal Emergency Management Agency, 500 C Street, SW., Washington, DC 20472, (202) 646-3886.

SUPLINF.P: The notice of a major disaster declaration for the State of North Carolina is hereby amended to include the following area among those areas determined to have been adversely affected by the event declared a major disaster by the President in his declaration of February 2, 2010.

EXTRACT.P: The Eastern Band of the Cherokee Indians Qualla Boundary Tribal Land for Public Assistance.
EXTRACT.FP:
The following Catalog of Federal Domestic Assistance Numbers (CFDA) are to be used
for reporting and drawing funds: 97.030, Community Disaster Loans; 97.031, Cora Brown Fund; 97.032, Crisis Counseling; 97.033, Disaster Legal Services; 97.034, Disaster Unemployment Assistance (DUA); 97.046, Fire Management Assistance Grant; 97.048, Disaster Housing Assistance to Individuals and Households In Presidentially Declared Disaster Areas; 97.049, Presidentially Declared Disaster AssistanceâDisaster Housing Operations for Individuals and Households; 97.050, Presidentially Declared Disaster Assistance to Individuals and HouseholdsâOther Needs; 97.036, Disaster GrantsâPublic Assistance (Presidentially Declared Disasters); 97.039, Hazard Mitigation Grant.
